scripts.install-all: npm install && npm run install-client && npm run install-admin && npm run install-server
scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail "npm run dev --prefix client" "npm run dev --prefix admin" "npm run dev --prefix server"
scripts.db-migrate: cd server && npx prisma migrate dev && cd ..
scripts.db-studio: cd server && npx prisma studio && cd ..
